title: OPERA: Orchestrated Planner-Executor Reasoning Architecture for Reasoning-Driven Retrieval

defines.name: OPERA
defines.definition: A reasoning-driven retrieval framework that orchestrates planning, retrieval, reasoning, and filtering through separate planning and execution modules.

defines.name: MAPGRPO
defines.definition: A multi-agent variant of GRPO that sequentially optimizes specialized agents with role-specific rewards for planning, reasoning, and retrieval.

problem: Existing RAG methods struggle with multi-hop reasoning because planning, retrieval, and filtering are weakly coupled, leading to poor sub-goal planning, ineffective query reformulation, and noisy retrieval filtering.
